function.name: LongBoneFractureReduction
function.description: Guided interactive workflow for LongBoneFractureReduction. Execute steps in order. Interactive steps require user 3D interaction. Steps: 'cb_step_1': In the "Input volume" section, select the CT volume for processing.; 'cb_step_2': In the "Segment Editor" module, create a new segmentation named "Reference_Segmentation".; 'cb_step_3': In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Add" button and rename the segment to "Reference_Segment" under "Reference_Segmentation".; 'cb_step_4': In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Threshold" button.; 'cb_step_5': In the "Segment Editor" module, adjust the threshold slider to set the segmentation range.; 'cb_step_6': In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Apply" button.; 'cb_step_7': In the "Segment Editor" module, click the "Islands" button.; 'cb_step_8': In the "Segment Editor" module, select the "Keep selected island" option.; 'cb_step_9': In the 2D view, click to select the reference part. (interactive: generic); 'cb_step_10': Set the segment "Reference_Segment" invisible.

user_action.description: Action: 'start' to begin a step, 'proceed' after user completes interaction, 'skip' for optional steps, 'cancel' to abort workflow, 'choice_made' for user_choice steps

choice_value.description: Value selected by the user for user_choice steps. Required when user_action is 'choice_made'.
